heading: Proceeds from sale of materials, etc.
label: 393 Proceeds from sale of materials, etc.
text: There shall be covered into the reclamation fund the proceeds of the sales of material utilized for temporary work and structures in connection with the operations under the Act of , known as the reclamation Act, as well as of the sales of all other condemned property which had been purchased under the provisions thereof, and also any moneys refunded in connection with the operations under said reclamation Act.June 17, 1902
notes: References in TextAct of , known as the reclamation Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.June 17, 1902act June 17, 1902, ch. 109332 Stat. 388section 371 of this title
